description: Letta provides tooling for building and running stateful AI agents with memory, tools, and remote or local execution modes. Its products include a hosted agent platform/API and a terminal-based agent client.
summary: Letta exposes a bearer-authenticated REST API at `https://api.letta.com/v1` plus an npm-distributed `letta` CLI that can run either against the Letta API with `LETTA_API_KEY` or locally without credentials.
